items.briefing:
From 1 July, some text messages in Australia will look different as telcos implement new sender ID protections — if you receive an unexpected SMS that looks unusual, be cautious before clicking any links. Separately, a new type of malware called "Phantom Stealer" is targeting saved browser credentials, meaning passwords stored in Chrome or Edge could be at risk without any file being downloaded to your device.

Australian sports betting app users are also being warned about rising fraud targeting those platforms. If you use betting apps, keep them updated and avoid using them on public Wi-Fi.

**Tip:** Clear saved passwords from your browser and use a dedicated password manager instead — it's safer and harder for malware to access.

featured.title: Australian firms roll back AI agents over governance
featured.quote: Australian enterprises rolling back AI agents signals critical governance gaps affecting business operations.
